meta.title: Managing OT Cyber Risks In Mergers & Acquisitions
meta.description: Nathan Fink of ElementR looks at how acquiring companies are learning about and dealing with OT cyber risk in their acquisition target today, and how this should change in the future. There also is the increased cyber risk that takes place during the acquisition process.
